parsed_review.summary: CP00-737 is a descriptor-only RP24 Korean Legal Depth pack (RP24.P05.M05.S03-S12, "Permission And Audit Binding", 10 units, risk A) that extends the established CP722-CP736 pattern with no new runtime behavior. End-to-end internal consistency verified via read-only inspection: KOREAN_LEGAL_CP737_PACK_BINDING and KOREAN_LEGAL_CP737_REQUIREMENTS (deliverable_counts fixture:4/claude_review:1/implementation:3/security_audit:2; micro_title "Permission And Audit Binding":10) match the manifest plan_binding_snapshot, review-baseline, plan live_state (CP00-737), and next-pack-queue (live_latest CP00-737, queue starts CP00-738). service.js/validators.js add the CP737 case set, descriptor, Hermes/Claude packets, and coverage/descriptor validators using the shared helpers; index.js re-exports the six required public symbols. model.test.js adds CP00-737 coverage, runtime-closed descriptor (runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-738), and "contract projection is latest" tests. The contract was regenerated with latest_pack=CP00-737 and latest_projection=KoreanLegalCp737P05PermissionAuditBindingDescriptor, CP722-CP736 preserved as historical, and zero "valid": false entries. No-write/no-real-data/runtime-closed boundaries are enforced at row, descriptor, and NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION levels (writes_product_state/creates_database_rows/updates_database_rows/writes_object_storage/external_runtime_called=false; hwpx/court/litigation/corporate/clause runtime opened=false; permission_decision_detail_included=false; audit_event_body_included=false). Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; Hermes packet emits no runtime receipt (descriptor_only_korean_legal_no_write), i.e. control-plane patterns used only for deterministic review packet/receipt handling, not product runtime. command-evidence shows the full validation ladder + npm test + node --test korean-legal at exit 0; review readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1226-byte valid JSON), so there is no auth-failure / 0-byte / malformed / fenced-with-prose / tool-call-shaped evidence, and invalid_review_attempts is empty. Manifest correctly claims production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false (descriptor verified only), so there is no over-claim of runtime or enterprise trust. No P0-P3 findings; the pack is clean to close as a descriptor-only continuation. Claude acted strictly as read-only independent reviewer and not final approver; final human approval for any enterprise-trust or runtime claim remains outside this receipt and does not block this CP closeout goal.
